TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Hbun-Rangay, title = Hbun-Rangay, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hbun-Rangay} }

S.FORM: alang Hbun-Rangay ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 108 buwan, 293 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 89% kyan ku 262 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 11% kyan ku 31 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 88%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Hbun-Rangay hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Hbun-Rangay hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Hbun-Rangay hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Hbun-Rangay hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Hbun-Rangay hya' ga Mkslaq. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Hbun-Rangay ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 108 buwan, 293 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 89% kyan ku 262 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 11% kyan ku 31 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 88%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Hbun-Rangay hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Hbun-Rangay hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Hbun-Rangay hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Hbun-Rangay hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Hbun-Rangay hya' ga Mkslaq. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ħβun-raŋaj ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu naħuj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ru kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ħβun-raŋaj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na ħβun-raŋaj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ħβun-raŋaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ħβun-raŋaj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ħβun-raŋaj ħjaʔ ɣa mks~ɕlaq. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
